elements.text:
Suppose that you want to know the population aged 18 to 24 in as many countries as possible
You will use a computer program to
Find persistent identifiers for “Population” and “Age” 
Search metadata files for data with dimensions “Population” and “Age” 
Filter results for data sets that can be aggregated to ages 18 to 24
Codelists (e.g., [“0”, “1”, “2”,…] or [“0-4”, “5-9”,…]) will have persistent identifiers in the metadata file
In other words, FAIR vocabularies will automate “data wrangling”
